name: Verify G+ Cognitive Ability Test
description: Measures general mental ability including numerical, verbal, and deductive reasoning. Ideal for predicting performance across a wide range of job levels and industries.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32)
description: Provides clear, simple, and objective insight into how a candidate's personality will impact their performance and behavior at work.

name: Numerical Reasoning Test
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data. Often used for finance, analytical, and managerial roles.

name: Verbal Reasoning Test
description: Evaluates the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments as presented in written form. Suited for graduate, professional, and management roles.

name: Inductive Reasoning Test
description: Measures the ability to draw inferences and understand the relationships between various concepts independently of acquired knowledge.

name: Deductive Reasoning Test
description: Assesses the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, evaluate arguments, and analyze scenarios.

name: Coding Skills Assessment (Java)
description: A practical coding simulation that evaluates a developer's ability to write functional, efficient, and bug-free Java code in realistic scenarios.

name: Coding Skills Assessment (Python)
description: Evaluates a candidate's proficiency in Python programming through hands-on coding tasks, algorithms, and data structure manipulation.

name: Customer Service Simulation
description: Places candidates in a simulated environment resembling a typical customer service role to assess their handling of customer interactions.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Helps organizations understand what drives and motivates an individual at work, and what situations may reduce their motivation.
